SQLLite.SQL: SELECT (SELECT NVL(SUM(dd.dd_amount), 0) FROM debt_dividends dd , allowed_debts ald WHERE dd.dd_ald_seq = ald.debt_seq AND ald.debt_co_number = ${param.coNumber} AND ald.debt_status in ('LIVE', 'SCHEDULE2','PAID') AND dd.created = 'Y') as "CreditorPaymentsMade" , (SELECT NVL(SUM(dd.dd_amount), 0) FROM debt_dividends dd , allowed_debts ald WHERE dd.dd_ald_seq = ald.debt_seq AND ald.debt_co_number = ${param.coNumber} AND ald.debt_status in ('LIVE', 'PAID') AND dd.created = 'Y') as "NonSched2CredPaymentsMade" , (SELECT NVL(SUM(d.div_fee),0) FROM dividends d WHERE d.div_co_number = ${param.coNumber} AND d.created = 'Y') as "FeesPaid" , (SELECT NVL(SUM(pay.amount), 0) FROM payments pay , allowed_debts ald WHERE ald.debt_seq = pay.ald_debt_seq AND pay.passthrough = 'Y' AND ald.debt_co_number = ${param.coNumber} AND ald.debt_status in ('LIVE', 'PAID') AND pay.error_indicator = 'N') as "PassthroughsPaid" , (SELECT NVL(SUM(pay.amount), 0) FROM payments pay , allowed_debts ald WHERE ald.debt_seq = pay.ald_debt_seq AND pay.passthrough = 'Y' AND ald.debt_co_number = ${param.coNumber} AND ald.debt_status = 'SCHEDULE2' AND pay.error_indicator = 'N') as "Sched2PassthroughsPaid" , (SELECT NVL(SUM(ald.debt_amount_allowed), 0) FROM allowed_debts ald WHERE ald.debt_co_number = ${param.coNumber} AND ald.debt_status in ('LIVE', 'SCHEDULE2', 'PAID')) as "LiveDebts" , (SELECT NVL(SUM(ald.debt_amount_allowed), 0) FROM allowed_debts ald WHERE ald.debt_co_number = ${param.coNumber} AND ald.debt_status in ('LIVE', 'PAID')) as "IncludedDebts" , (SELECT NVL(co.fee_amount,0) FROM consolidated_orders co WHERE co.co_number = ${param.coNumber}) as "FeeElement" FROM DUAL

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
